message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement mission (#890)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-5582-tls-configuration-and-or-docs-enhancement",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement",
+    "description": "TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement. This issue affects 25+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-workflows troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-workflows deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
After the 3.0 release, argo-server listens on HTTPS with a self-signed certificate by default. Check whether TLS certificates are properly configured via a Kubernetes Secret mounted into the argo-server pod."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement",
+        "description": "Configure TLS for argo-server by mounting cert-manager secrets. Secrets from cert-manager contain a `ca.crt` which is added to the certificate trusts, allowing privately signed certificates to be used.

```yaml
volumeMounts:
  - mountPath: /tmp
    name: tmp
  - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.crt
    name: tls
    readOnly: true
    subPath: argo-server.crt
  - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.key
    name: tls
    readOnly: true
    subPath: argo-server.key
securityContext:
  fsGroup: 8737
  runAsNonRoot: true
volumes:
- emptyDir: {}
  name: tmp
- name: tls
  secret:
    defaultMode: 420
    items:
    - key: tls.crt
      path: argo-server.crt
    - key: tls.key
      path: argo-server.key
    secretName: argo-secret
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Configure argo-server TLS by mounting cert-manager secrets (tls.crt, tls.key, ca.crt) into the pod. The ca.crt is added to certificate trusts, enabling privately signed certificates. Use an Ingress with ssl-passthrough to terminate TLS at the argo-server.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /tmp
          name: tmp
        - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.crt
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.crt
        - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.key
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.key
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 8737
        runAsNonRoot: true
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: tmp
      - name: tls
        secret:
          defaultMode: 420
          items:
          - key: tls.crt
            path: argo-server.crt
          - key: tls.key
            path: argo-server.key
          secretName: argo-secret",
+        "apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: argo-server-ingress
  namespace: argo
  labels:
    "use-http01-solver": "true"
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: letsencrypt-prod
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: nginx
    kubernetes.io/tls-acme: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-passthrough: "true"
spec:
  rules:
  - host: argo.somedomain.com
    http:
      paths:
      - pathType: Prefix
        path: /
        backend:
          service:
            name: argo-server
            port:
              name: web
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - argo.somedomain.com
    secretName: argo-secret",
+        "volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /argo-server.crt
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.crt
        - mountPath: /argo-server.key
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.key
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 8737
      volumes:
      - name: tls
        secret:
          items:
          - key: tls.crt
            path: argo-server.crt
          - key: tls.key
            path: argo-server.key
          secretName: argo-secret"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Ingress",
+      "Configmap"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/5582",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/7884"
+    },
+    "reactions": 25,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:19:22.983Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
